prompt: Create a realistic vertical street-photography portrait of a young woman standing at a busy city crosswalk at dusk or early evening, in a neon-lit Japanese entertainment district resembling Shibuya or Shinjuku. She is shown from the chest up in a three-quarter side pose, looking toward the left side of the frame, with long wavy dark brown to black hair falling over her shoulders. She wears a thick textured black wool coat with a wide collar and a single long dangling silver earring visible on her right ear. Her face is deliberately covered by one centered opaque square privacy block, colored muted brown, hiding the entire facial area from forehead to chin. The background shows a zebra crossing with blurred pedestrians, tall buildings, glowing vertical shop signs, colorful red, yellow, blue, and white neon lights, and strong bokeh from a shallow depth of field. Use natural handheld photography, 50mm lens feel, soft ambient city light, realistic fabric texture, cinematic urban atmosphere, subject sharply focused while the background is heavily blurred. Vertical 2:3 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people in focus.
